zh.lifeSummary: John Holywood於大約1229年與MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Holywood于大约1229年与MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Holywood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: of Norman origin, possibly a habitational name from Hollywood, Dublin.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Ó Cuileannáin ‘descendant of Cuileannán’, a personal name apparently based on a diminutive of cuileann ‘holly tree’, and more commonly Anglicized as Cullinan or Cullen .

English: possibly a habitational name from any of various farms or hamlets in England called Hollywood, such as one in Sandon and Burston (Staffordshire), perhaps named with Middle English holli ‘holly’ + wode ‘wood’. However, the place is not on record before 1775, and all Hollywoods appear to be late.

variants.name: Cullinan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Cormac.
Irish (Clare): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cuileannáin ‘descendant of Cuileannán’, from a diminutive of Cuileann (see Cullen 2).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Holywood married MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD about 1229. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: John Holywood a épousé MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD environ 1229. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: John Holywood hat um 1229 MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: John Holywood lui sposato MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD circa 1229. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: John Holywoodは約1229年にMRS. JOHN HOLYWOODと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Holywood(은)는 대략 1229년 MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Holywood casou-se com MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD aproximadamente 1229. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: John Holywood женился на женщине по имени MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD около 1229 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: John Holywood se casó con MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD aproximadamente 1229. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
